tags.name: Island View Beach Regional Park Campground
tags.note: Fee: Tent-$15/night, RV-$20/night. Open: May long weekend to September long weekend. 18- RV sites, 24 treed tent sites.

tags.name: Camp Nor'Wester
tags.note: Camp and Office are in different locations.

tags.access:description: Site closed for hunting 1 Nov - 28 Feb. IMPORTANT 100% reservable from May 15 to Sept 30 so paddlers advised to reserve. 2 small overflow areas. Mid-week sites often available on first first served basis. 250-654-4000,Toll-free: 1-866-944-1744
tags.description: Open grassy sites, tent pads. Picnic tables. Gear carts. Picnic shelter. Vault toilets. Fee charged May - Sept.
tags.description:approach: Easy sheltered sand beach at all water levels. BW aspect. Small seasonal dock. W aspect. Lagoon closed to all boating.
tags.description:other: Site no longer offers drinking water. Trails. Swimming. Anchorage. Birding, fallow deer, wildlife. Frequent foot passenger ferry in summer from Sidney. Gulf Islands National Park Reserve.
tags.name: Sidney Spit Campsite / BC Marine Trail

tags.description: Approach from south. Take out in the cove and walk up to campsite.12/night/8 in site. Raccoons will take any accessible food. Water at South Camp, May-September.
tags.name: Cascadia Marine Trail Campsite - Jones Island

tags.description: 3 tent pads 150 m above beach. 2 pit toilets. Hammock opportunities. Fee charged May - Sept. No fires, including below high tide mark. Possible overflow site on tombolo.
tags.description:approach: Easy on exposed gravel, pebble tombolo between Rum and Gooch Islands. Choose either N or S aspect depending on conditions.
tags.description:other: On Rum Island. Small attractive island with views, trail. seal, bird colonies. Isle de Lis (Lily Island) name given by former owner. Gulf Islands National Park Reserve.
tags.name: Rum Island

tags.description: Water at South Camp, May - September.
tags.name: Jones Island North Camp

tags.description: Gravel tent pads near beach with some shelter in mature forest. Pit toilet. 7 picnic tables. Hammock opportunities. Fee charged May - Sept. No fires, including below high tide mark. No water.
tags.description:approach: Pebble beach. Exposed to SE winds. Strong SE wind may cause hazardous steep surf conditions. Alternative beach, NNE aspect, nearby to N offers longer but easy carry to tent sites.
tags.description:other: Attractive. View. Rough trail across island to historic former leper colony. Gulf Islands National Park Reserve.
tags.name: D'Arcy Island Campground / BC Marine Trail

tags.description: No water. Whole island is CMT campsite (human / wind powered only), but also a popular stop for lunch with tour groups. The two designated Cascadia Marine Trail campsites are close together, near toilet.
tags.name: Cascadia Marine Trail - Posey Island

tags.description: Water available May 15-Sept. 4. Excellent clamming for littlenecks and butter clams on the gravel beach. 5 CMT sites; 14 total camp sites. Time your arrival and departure to the tides to avoid a long haul to the campsite.
tags.name: Cascadia Marine Trail Campsite - Stuart Island
Cascadia Marine Trail Campsite -  San Juan County Park
